files_deferred: Full path conditioning backoff hierarchy / ResidualBlockMeta rich features -> bounded unconditioned block bootstrap + labeled Gaussian Level-6 fallback.
ExpandedReturnQuantileModel / return_distribution.py full pipeline -> conformal attaches via dict to return_distributions.
HGB challengers for regime/competing-risk -> multinomial logistic first.
select_calibrator nested isotonic gates for regime -> sigmoid/identity via Phase 5 calibrators.
Full structural_state.py conditioning builder -> small feature dict only.
Part 2 shadow orchestration and prediction store wiring -> attach_v3_fields helper established.
behavior_preserved: Missing uncertainty components stay None and are reweighted; all-missing composite is 1.0.
OOD scores are bounded [0,1] with explicit no-support unknown state.
Conformal corrections fit on calibration sessions only; OOD widens and marks coverage_limited.
Regime probabilities are a full vector (dominant is diagnostic only) and renormalize to ~1.
Mixture-of-experts blends with the full regime vector; low-support experts shrink/fallback to global.
Competing-risk probabilities sum to ~1; survival is non-increasing; same-step path ambiguity is adverse-first.
Path seeds derive from snapshot_id + model_version + horizon + config hash.
intentional_changes: Path model uses a bounded bootstrap (not full V3 backoff stack) with explicit Gaussian fallback labeling.
Conformal attach_to_distribution ReturnDistribution dependency replaced with dict attachment.
Regime auto-calibration uses sigmoid rather than System A select_calibrator gates.
attach_v3_fields rebuilds frozen MarketForecastBundle with V3 extension slots from Phase 5 contract.
known_gaps: Path conditioning backoff levels 0-4 are not fully ported; Level-5 unconditioned + Level-6 gaussian are.
Competing-risk / regime / MoE are not yet registered as default ForecastServer group components.
Historical OOS loss store for ensemble weights is caller-supplied only.
Candidate labels and candidate factory remain Phase 7+.
rollback: Revert the Phase 6 commit. Phases 0-5 are unaffected.
No new third-party dependencies were added in Phase 6 (uses Phase 5 sklearn/joblib).
next_phase: Phase 7 — Candidate factory (spec §63): family registry, candidate geometry, payoff engine, stable IDs, maximum-loss proof, deterministic dominance.
